description: Creates a GCT file from a set of CEL files from Affymetrix ST arrays.
author: David Eby & Barbara A Hill, Broad Institute ; Anthony Castanza, UCSD
plan:
## AffySTExpressionFileCreator GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
AffySTExpressionFileCreator is a GenePattern module that Creates a GCT file from a set of CEL files from Affymetrix ST arrays.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: input.file, normalize, background.correct, qc.plot.format, annotate.rows, output.file.base
- Optional: clm.file

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript /AffySTEFC/run_gp_affyst_efc.R /AffySTEFC/ --input.file\=<input.file> --normalize\=<normalize> --background.correct\=<background.correct> --qc.plot.format\=<qc.plot.format> <clm.file> --annotate.rows\=<annotate.rows> --output.file.base\=<output.file.base>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/affy-st-expression-file-creator\:2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: One or more Affymetrix ST CEL files uploaded individually, or as a ZIP or TAR file, or supplied through a directory input.  CEL files can be uncompressed or in GZ format. TAR files can be uncompressed, or in GZ, XZ, or BZ2 format.  The parameter will accept multiple inputs in any of these forms.

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.description: Whether to normalize data using quantile normalization

parameters.name: qc.plot.format
parameters.description: Choose a file format for the QC plots (or skip them completely)

parameters.name: clm.file
parameters.description: A tab-delimited text file containing one scan, sample, and class per line

parameters.name: annotate.rows
parameters.description: Whether to annotate rows with the gene symbol and description. Unsupported array types will produce blank annotations.

parameters.name: output.file.base
parameters.description: The base name of the output file(s). File extensions will be added automatically.
